{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Shells of the Titan
| introduced = cradle-12-waybound
}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Shells of the Titan]] are orbiting constructs.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c36">''Waybound'', chapter 36</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
